'''Radell Mining Corporation''', commonly abbreviated '''RMC''', was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] company that worked primarily in the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]]. Although headquartered on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Elrood/Legends|Elrood]], the corporation owned many other planets in the [[Sector/Legends|sector]], such as [[Halbara/Legends|Halbara]], [[Acatal]] and [[Dega]] and had offices located in the [[Elrood Bazaar]]. During the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Radell Mining Corp. struggled with [[Imperial Mining, Ltd.]] for economic control of the sector. As a mining company, RMC funded many planetary explorations, discovering planets such as [[Alluuvia]].
